name: workout-planer
description: Modulare WorkoutPlaner Web-App mit 14-Tage-Ansicht, Trainingsplan-Tracking, Skip-Funktion und Workout-Editor

scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names SERVER,CSS --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npx nodemon server.js" "npx tailwindcss -i ./src/styles/input.css -o ./public/css/output.css --watch"

author: YozouChan
